chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1888 of 2012 Mst. Mahjabeen Raza Versus M/s Dadabhoy Investment & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 10099/24 2. For orders on CMA 10100/24 Dated: 17.05.2024 Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Asif Malik for respondent. -.-.- 1) Urgency granted. 2) Both the learned counsel appearing for parties submit that the dispute between the parties has been settled amicably out of Court hence petitioner in view of such out of Court settlement does not wish to press this petition and has filed this application for withdrawal, which is accordingly allowed and the petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Judge Judge
